data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for multi-part MIME support.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the multi-part MIME (HTML + plain text fallback) requirement, but the provided evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm its implementation. While the linked use case mentions the need for multi-part MIME, there are no specific details or evidence provided to ascertain whether this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of sufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of multi-part MIME (HTML + plain text fallback).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
